meta.title: Mĩvango ya kũtetheesya andũ methĩwe matonya kwĩthukĩĩsya

hero.title: Mĩvango ya kũtetheesya andũ methĩwe matonya kwĩthukĩĩsya
hero.lead: Kĩlungu kĩĩ kĩ na maũvoo matavanĩtw'e ĩũlũ wa maũndũ me kĩvathũkany'o ala matethetw'e nĩ ũseũvyo wa Yeova (International Telecommunication Task Force).

header.title: Kĩsese kya matukũ aa kya kũtumbĩthya mavuku

intro: Mĩvango ĩla yeekiwe nĩyonanĩtw'e vaa ĩtheo.

header.kicker: Onany'a kana wĩ na vata nake
header.title: Kwĩthĩwa na mũvango mũseo wa kũtetheesya ala mate na ũkwati

paragraphs: IATF nĩtetheeasya ala mekwenda kũtetheew'a mamanthe myanya ya kwony'a andũ nzĩa nzeo sya kwĩmanyĩasya Mbivilia vate ndĩvi.

emptyState.title: O na yu vai mavuku maeleetw'e ũndũ mũna ĩũlũ wa Mbivilia.
paragraphs: IATF nĩendeee kũseũvya ĩvuku yayo ya mbee ya kũmanyĩsya andũ Mbivilia.
No ũtũmĩe ũvano ũũ wa QR ũtũmĩĩte simũ yaku.
